sheet_name: ST (ระดับชั้นที่ 1 - ชานพัก)
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า41.png
view_title: ขยายบันได ST -- ช่วงชั้นที่ 1 ถึงชานพัก

elements.description: staircase flight from ground floor level to landing, terminates into B2 beams at both ends

main_bar.location: step nosing/distribution bars, multiple locations along flight
at every corner (ทุกมุม), step reinforcement

elements.description: CN short column shown embedded at the top landing corner of this stair, connecting down to B2 beam

warnings: This stair section connects to 'B2' beam marks at both the floor-1 end and the landing end -- consistent with B2 appearing at those grid positions on S-04 (floor 1 beam plan).
